title: ヒシアマ姐さんの特等席

text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon and I are on our way home after a
day out, when...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey Teach, you free after this?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
If you're up for it, there's somethin' I wanna show
you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Heh. I think it's better if it's left a surprise.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Look, you can see the whole town from up here.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There isn't anything special about this hill right
now, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh good, looks like we've come just in time.

From up on the hill, we watch the town get
bathed in red as the sun slowly sets.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Pretty great view, eh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I found this place by chance back when I was in
the middle of some hill training.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I was exhausted after clearing this hill in one huge
sprint, but I totally forgot how tired I was the
second I laid eyes on the sunset.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I thought it'd be nice if you could see it too.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I always thought of sunsets the way they show 'em
in gangster flicks—lookin' up at the sky from the
riverside after a good one-on-one.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But they hit different when you look down at
them from up here.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, wanna see what'll happen next?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's just take a rest on that bench for a bit
and find out.

The sun is about to completely set, but I sit on
the bench as instructed.

Eventually, the sky turns dark, and the town
below us twinkles to life with sparks of light.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya think? Pretty cool that we can see the
nighttime scenery like this so close to the
academy, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The air is pretty fresh round here despite this
being an urban area, and there's nothin' blocking
the stars.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I owe you a lot, Teach. This is my thanks for
everything you do.
choice_data_list:
Thank you. It's so like you to bring me here as
thanks.

Thank you. It's so like you to bring me here as
thanks.
I didn't take you for the sentimental type.
I didn't take you for the sentimental type.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I owe you a lot, Teach. This is my thanks for
everything you do.
choice_data_list:
Thank you. It's so like you to bring me here as
thanks.

Thank you. It's so like you to bring me here as
thanks.
I didn't take you for the sentimental type.
I didn't take you for the sentimental type.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Well, I've always been the type to aim for
the top, both literally and figuratively.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've always liked goin' to the very top of high
places. It gets me feelin' refreshed.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I used to compete with my friends to see who
could climb up trees and boulders the fastest.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I might not look the part, but I was raised
in a rural part of the U.S.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
One time, I got myself into an accident. Jumped
off a big rock at a campsite, and came down
covered in scrapes.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The night sky I saw back then was beautiful, but...
this one might be just as good.

I enjoy the night view with Hishi Amazon as she
tells me all about her wild childhood.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! What do you take me for? Some kinda
mushy poser?!
choice_data_list: Well, I thought it was pretty cute of you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Shut up, you dummy! Who're you callin' "cute"?!
Don't go actin' like Fuji now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm the Hishi Amazon—the all-powerful, awe-inspiring head of Miho Dorm!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Geez! I can't believe you of all people are making
fun of me!

She's adorable when she's mad too, but I keep
that to myself. I don't actually want to upset her.
